scripts.start: concurrently -n "BRIDGE,WEB" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold" "npm start --prefix nfc-bridge" "npm run dev --prefix dashboard"
scripts.simula: concurrently -i --default-input-target 0 -n "BRIDGE,SIMULA" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold" "npm run mock --prefix nfc-bridge" "npm run dev --prefix dashboard"
